title: Milor 925 Sterling Silver Figaro Chain Bracelet Made in Italy 7 in
hook: Classic Italian craftsmanship on your wrist — slim, polished, and ready to wear.
description: Milor has been crafting quality sterling silver chains in Italy for decades, and this Figaro-link bracelet is a clean example of that tradition. The alternating long-and-short oval links lie flat and catch the light beautifully, making it equally easy to wear alone or layered with other pieces. The spring ring clasp closes securely, and the polished finish runs consistently throughout every link.

listing_body:
Classic Italian craftsmanship on your wrist — slim, polished, and ready to wear.

Milor has been crafting quality sterling silver chains in Italy for decades, and this Figaro-link bracelet is a clean example of that tradition. The alternating long-and-short oval links lie flat and catch the light beautifully, making it equally easy to wear alone or layered with other pieces. The spring ring clasp closes securely, and the polished finish runs consistently throughout every link.

The bracelet measures approximately 7 inches end to end with a link width of about 3 mm.
- Length: ~7 in (~17.8 cm)
- Width: ~3.08 mm (~0.12 in)
- Weight: 2.50 g (~0.09 oz)
